entryView.title: Terminal Manager
commands.startSaveLog: Save the log of the current terminal
commands.stopSaveLog: Stop saving the log of the current terminal
configurations.view.position.description: When selected, the terminals will opened in the editor area otherwise the terminal will open in the normal mode.
configurations.log.savePath.title: Log path
configurations.log.savePath.description: Set the path to the save log directory. e.g. `c:\log` if not set, it will default to the `log` folder in the expansion path
configurations.log.size.title: Log file size limit
configurations.log.size.description: Limit the log file to a specified size. When the log file size exceed this number, a new file is created.
configurations.log.defaultAddingTimeStam: Add timestamps to each line of the log by default
configurations.script.savePath.title: Script path
configurations.script.savePath.descripti: Set the path to the save script notebook directory. e.g. `c:\script` if not set, it will default to the `script` folder in the expansion path
xtp.terminal.title: XTP Terminal
xtp.terminal.xagent.start.failed: XTP-Agent start failed, no process found!
